subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come is verily the Sovereign of existence in both the unseen and the visible realms [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی انه لسلطان الوجود من الغیب و الشهود و
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @station of the Manifestation of God
